description: Recto: Bill of release. Dated: 10 Nisan 1360 Seleucid = 16 March 1049 CE. Location: Fusṭāṭ. In which Avraham b. Ṣedaqa b. Eliyya b. Yehoshuaʿ ha-Kohen releases his uncles Ḥalfon b. Eliyya and Seʿadya b. Ekliyya, and their mother Miryam bt. Maymūn, from claims concerning the inheritance from his father or of the latter from his grandfather. Witnessed by Surūr b. Ḥayyim Ibn Sabra, Yeshuʿa b. Avraham ha-Levi, Naḥum b. Yehoshuaʿ ha-Kohen, the parnas Yaʿīsh b. Avraham ha-Kohen, Muʿammar b. Yosef b. Muʿammar the judge, Maṣliaḥ b. Shemuel, and attested by the Bet Din. (Information in part from CUDL; see also Goitein's index card and Med Soc. section IX, C, 4, note 52.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
